title: Far from Vietnam
director: Jean-Luc Godard, Joris Ivens, William Klein
writer: Jean-Luc Godard, Jean Lacouture, Chris Marker
actors: Anne Bellec, Karen Blanguernon, Fidel Castro
plot: In seven different segments, Godard, Klein, Lelouch, Marker, Resnais, and Varda show their sympathy and support for the North Vietnamese army during the Vietnam War.
